title: Learn From 2025's Most Popular Python Tutorials and Courses
content: — FREE Email Series — 🐍 Python Tricks 💌  🔒 No spam. Unsubscribe any time. Table of Contents Table of Contents As we welcome 2026, it’s time to look back on an exciting year for Python.Python 3.14arrived with a wave of developer-focused improvements, from lazy annotations that finally resolve long-standing type hinting quirks to clever new t-strings that give you more control over string interpolation. Meanwhile, 2025 was the yearAI toolstruly became part of everyday Python development. From agentic coding with LangGraph to connectingLLMsto your data viaMCPservers, Python solidified its position as the language of choice for AI-powered workflows. Here atReal Python, we’re excited to showcase the tutorials and video courses that resonated most with our community throughout 2025. Whether you’re just starting out with Python, leveling up your skills, or diving into advanced topics, this collection has something for you. Join Now:Click here to join the Real Python Newsletterand you’ll never miss another Python tutorial, course, or news update. Take the Quiz:Test your knowledge with our interactive “Python Skill Test” quiz. You’ll receive a score upon completion to help you track your learning progress: Interactive Quiz Test your Python knowledge in a skills quiz with basic to advanced questions. Are you a Novice, Intermediate, Proficient, or Expert? If you’re just getting started with Python,building a solid foundationis the best investment you can make. The fundamentals you learn now will support everything you do later, fromdata analysistoweb developmenttoAI. These beginner-friendly tutorials and courses help you sharpen the core skills you’ll use every day in Python, including loops, operators, lists, and functional techniques: If you’re looking to accelerate your learning with live instruction, then check out ourPython for Beginners Live Course, where you can learn alongside other students and get real-time feedback from experienced instructors. And don’t forget to grab our downloadablePython 3 Cheat Sheetto keep essential syntax and concepts at your fingertips: Learn Python 3 fundamentals at a glance: data types, functions, classes, and more! Python 3.14 brought a collection of thoughtful improvements that make writing and debugging code more enjoyable. The REPL now feels like a proper modern shell, making third-party REPLs likeIPython,ptpython, andbpythonless necessary. Type hints behave more intuitively, error messages point you in the right direction faster, and t-strings open up new possibilities for string processing. These tutorials walk you through the updates you’ll want to start using right away: If you’re curious about any other new features, you can also read the3.14 release notes. Staying current with new Python releases helps you write cleaner code and take advantage of performance improvements as they land. AI was one of the defining themes of 2025, with Python at the center of it all. The year marked the rise of agentic coding, and AI-assisted development began delivering truly impressive results. From orchestrating multi-agent systems to connectingLLMsdirectly to your data, Python developers gained powerful new ways to build intelligent applications. These resources show you how to take advantage of today’s cutting-edge AI tools: If you’re looking for a structured path to get started working productively with AI assistance as a Python developer, then check out our new learning path: Learning Path 9 Resources ⋅Skills:Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, AI-Assisted Development You can also explore our newAI Coding Toolsreference area and theAI Coding Glossaryto discover new tools and deepen your understanding of the rapidly evolving AI landscape. Python opens doors to a wide range of career opportunities, from software development and data science to automation and machine learning. But knowing the language is just one piece of the puzzle. Understanding how to position yourself, which skills employers value most, and how to demonstrate your abilities can make all the difference. These resources help you turn your Python knowledge into meaningful career progress: If you’re serious about building job-ready Python skills, consider joining one of ourlive courses. Working through problems alongside peers and an experienced instructor mirrors what you’ll encounter in technical interviews and on the job. Collaboration and clear communication matter just as much as writing correct code! The real-time feedback and structured challenges help you build confidence and develop the problem-solving habits that employers look for. If you’re just starting out, ourPython for Beginners Live Coursegives you a strong foundation with expert guidance. Already comfortable with the basics? TheIntermediate Python Deep Divepushes you further and prepares you for more complex, real-world challenges. One of the best ways to grow as a developer is to roll up your sleeves and build something real. Projects push you beyond tutorials and exercises, forcing you to make decisions, debug unexpected issues, and tie together concepts you’ve learned separately. The result? Deeper understanding, stronger problem-solving instincts, and something tangible to show potential employers or talk about in interviews. These hands-on resources guide you through building practical applications: Each project teaches you something different, from working with APIs and web frameworks to crafting polished terminal interfaces. Pick one that sparks your curiosity and start building! As your projects grow, so does the need for better organization and tooling. Managing dependencies, structuring your code, and automating repetitive tasks can mean the difference between a smooth development experience and constant frustration. Modern Python tooling has come a long way, making it easier than ever to keep your projects clean, maintainable, and production-ready. These tutorials and courses help you master the skills and tools that support professional Python development: With a solid project management workflow, you’ll spend less time wrestling with setup and more time building features that matter. Once you’re comfortable with the basics, exploring Python’s deeper mechanisms helps you write clearer, more efficient, and more expressive code. Understanding concepts like shallow vs deep copying, how bytes work under the hood, and what those arrow annotations actually mean will give you a stronger mental model of how Python operates. These tutorials and courses unpack important modern features of the language: Ready to truly understand what’s happening under the hood? TheIntermediate Python Deep Diveis an 8-week cohort-based course that takes you fromit workstoI understandwhyit works. You’ll master Python’s object model, special methods, closures, decorators, and more, all with live instruction, hands-on exercises, and a supportive community. Past participants saythey gained the confidence to dive deep into Python and read other people’s code with greater clarity and understanding. Good code is readable, maintainable, and easy to reason about. Developing healthy coding habits early pays dividends throughout your career, and leveraging the right tools makes it much easier to catch mistakes before they become bugs. From logging and linting to understanding Python’s naming conventions, these resources help you write code that your future self (and your teammates) will thank you for. These tutorials and courses help you level up your Python code quality: Writing clean code isn’t just about aesthetics. It’s about building software you can confidently extend, debug, and share with others. That’s becoming even more important with AI-assisted engineering. Python’s data stack continues to evolve, offering faster and more powerful ways to prepare, transform, and analyze data. Tools like Polars and DuckDB have emerged as serious alternatives to traditional workflows, while pandas and NumPy remain essential skills for any data practitioner. And with the rise ofLLMs, knowing how to prepare documents for AI pipelines has become a valuable skill in its own right. These tutorials and courses help you build efficient, modern data workflows: By exploring these tools, you’ll be equipped to handle data at any scale and prepare it for analysis, visualization, or feeding into AI models. Python has become a go-to choice for web development, powering everything from lightweight APIs to full-featured web applications. FastAPI has quickly risen as a favorite for building fast, modern backends, while Flask and Django remain reliable workhorses for projects of all sizes. And with browser automation tools like Selenium, you can interact with websites programmatically for testing, scraping, or workflow automation. These resources help you get hands-on with Python web development: From spinning up your first API to automating browser tasks, you’ll build a solid foundation for working on the web with Python. As we wrap up 2025, Python’s growth shows no signs of slowing down.Python 3.14brought meaningful improvements to the developer experience, and the explosion of AI tooling made Python more central than ever to building intelligent applications. It’s been an exciting year to be a Python developer. At Real Python, we’ve enjoyed sharing the latestcommunity news,quizzes, Office Hours, and more with you throughout the year. OurOffice Hourshave featured some great conversations and live showcases of modernAI Coding Tools, so put Office Hours on your calendar for 2026 if you haven’t already! Note:This year we also launched ourreference content, a new way to quickly look up Python terms and concepts. Across the site, you’ll now encounter link previews on hover for handy reminders—for example, what’s acallableagain? Click to dive deeper orbrowse the whole catalog. For structured ways to continue learning next year, explore ourPython Learning Paths, which guide you through topics at basic, intermediate, and advanced levels. For ongoing friendly and insightful conversations with Python developers from around the world, tune in toThe Real Python Podcast. Tip:If you’re ready to accelerate your learning in 2026, ourlive coursesare returning in February! Join thePython for Beginnerscourse to build a strong foundation, or take theIntermediate Python Deep Diveto master advanced patterns and write better Python. There’s no better way to level up than learning alongside peers with expert guidance. Thank you for being part of the Real Python community, and to thePython Software Foundationfor continuing to support the language and ecosystem we all love. Here’s to a productive and inspiring 2026!
